headline: Sweltering Heat Dome Threatens US Holiday Events and Power Grids
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A searing heat dome will push electricity demand across the eastern US toward record levels over the July 4 holiday, testing power grids as air conditioners run full tilt on a busy World Cup weekend.Most Read from BloombergExxon to Change Name for First Time in Decades After RedomicileWhy the Great American State Fair Looks So EmptyGermany Rejects Trump’s Demands for NATO Loyalty to WashingtonMeta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing PowerRussia Indicates Ukraine Fire
